title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.326 - Law not to affect previous surveys
text:
60.326.  Law not to affect previous surveys. — This chapter shall in no way be construed either to affect the legality of surveys legally made and recorded prior to September 28, 1979, or to prevent surveyors from taking advantage of any corners legally established prior to September 28, 1979.
(L. 1989 H.B. 190, et al.)
